---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for the plugin
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: LunarKittyy
---

## Summary
<!-- A short one-liner describing what you'd like to see. -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What's missing or frustrating right now? Why does this feature matter? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you'd like this to work. Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Are there other ways to solve this? Why is your approach better? -->

## Relevant Context

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Relates to Forge support? | Yes / No |
| Wildfire's Gender Mod version targeted | <!-- e.g. 5.x --> |
| Protocol version involved | <!-- if applicable --> |

## Additional Notes
<!-- Mockups, links, references to the upstream mod, or anything else helpful. -->
